config.name: Treasury Stability: Reserve Deployment Policy
config.hypothesis: An intermediate treasury overflow threshold (0.30-0.50) maximizes population stability and minimizes inequality, while extremes — aggressive deployment or passive hoarding — degrade outcomes

findings: Treasury ratio: 0.0029 at aggressive deployment (0.10) vs 0.0039 at hoarding (0.90) (+36.9%)
Peak population stability at overflow_threshold = 0.90 (mean pop: 49.2)
Gini coefficient: 0.5516 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.5438 at hoarding (0.90) (-1.4%)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean fitness: 0.5397 at aggressive deployment vs 0.5518 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.86 at deployment vs 6.76 at hoarding
Birth/death ratio: 1.0622 at deployment vs 1.0722 at hoarding
